enrichment.summary: Kyle films a casual vlog from his porch in Boulder, recapping recent days: recovering from exhaustion, his roommate helping with a bike tire, smoking weed (blue dream/hash oil), postponing a lipoma removal surgery, transferring music files from YouTube, setting up a new desk/computer system with an MP3 player and Sony waterproof Walkman, dealing with dying catfish, and noting body soreness and the need to stretch more.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Will do it himself since roommate and family all backed out
Gets him much higher than expected, especially when already tired
Admits he neglects water changes and needs to do them every two weeks on schedule
Leans toward getting a bunch of tetras next time
Knows he needs to do it daily, especially given increasing muscle soreness

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was really tired yesterday and passed out when I got home.

claims.subject: Kyle's roommate
claims.claim: My roommate offered to put a new tire on my bike because my tire was worn out.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I woke up after passing out and tried transferring files between my computers but was too tired.

claims.subject: Kyle's roommate
claims.claim: My roommate was smoking a lot of weed, specifically Blue Dream and hash oil.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Smoking weed, especially hash oil, makes me really high.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I passed out last night and woke up feeling lazy today.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I cleaned the house today.

claims.subject: Kyle's fatty lipoma
claims.claim: We were supposed to do surgery on my fatty lipoma today, but my roommate chickened out.

claims.subject: Kyle's family
claims.claim: My brother and mom don’t want to help with the lipoma surgery.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I might do the lipoma surgery myself next day off, especially the one on my neck.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I’ve been transferring files and downloading songs from YouTube using YTD video transfer and ABS audio converter.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I’m planning to make a video on the history of the papilla trees tomorrow.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I bought two 32-ounce beers today and am working on the first one.

claims.subject: Kyle's computer setup
claims.claim: I set up a new system with an external hard drive and a broken keyboard.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to get an extra keyboard for my other computer to make things easier.

claims.subject: Kyle's catfish
claims.claim: My catfish died, and the surviving one seemed sick and was breathing heavily.

claims.subject: Kyle's fish tank
claims.claim: I haven’t been changing the water every two weeks as recommended, only every month and a half.

claims.subject: Kyle's tetras
claims.claim: I’ve bought tetras twice, and most disappeared, but one from the first batch is still alive.

claims.subject: Kyle's fish
claims.claim: I currently have a big shark-looking tetra, a white one missing a tail, and a bottom feeder.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I don’t feel like making a feet video today; I’d rather drink beer and smoke.

claims.subject: Kyle's shoulder
claims.claim: I have a sore spot on the top of my shoulder joint, and I don’t know where it came from.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I need to start stretching regularly because I’m pulling muscles and getting sore spots.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I feel like I’m getting old because my body is getting sore and pulling muscles easily.
